{{Infobox group
| name = Consultant's Guild
| introduced = ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow
}}

''See also: [[Consultant's Guild Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[The Consultant]]'s [[Guild]] is a highly efficient and influential organization known for providing expert advice, business solutions, and strategic assistance to clients. While they are primarily recognized as advisors who can resolve complex commercial or military challenges, they possess a reputation for being an unstoppable force capable of sabotage, information manipulation, and assassination. Although some believe they do not employ killers, other accounts suggest they are capable of eliminating high-level targets like [[Champions]]. [[The Guild]] is characterized by its members' extreme professionalism, often described as precise and interchangeable specialists who follow contracts to the letter. They are widely regarded as the most loyal servants of the [[Empire]], maintaining a long history of absolute dedication to [[the Emperor]]. [[The Guild]] is governed by the [[Council of Architects]], a diverse ruling body composed of specialists such as strategists, administrators, and historians. While the organization has historically been led by this shifting council, a singular [[Guild Head]] has recently been appointed to provide unified leadership. The [[Consultants]] maintain significant resources, including vast fleets of ships and various specialized roles like [[Masons]] for infiltration or [[Gardeners]] for more lethal tasks. Despite their immense wealth and ability to outbid others, they are considered less effective in direct combat compared to other [[Guilds]]. Their influence is deeply tied to the stability of the [[Empire]], and they have recently faced challenges regarding their power in relation to the [[Regents]].}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Consultant's Guild]] is a group that [[Naberius]] warns not to underestimate.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c3">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Architects]] rule in the [[Consultant's Guild]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c14">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Consultant's Guild]] is known to help anyone for enough cash and is dedicated to the [[Empire]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c20">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[The Consultant]]’s [[Guild]] is a professional organization that maintains archives and accepts commissions from various clients. Represented by a crest featuring a simple pair of gardening shears, the group receives information relayed through [[Masons]]. During an investigation into client suspicions at [[75 Hanberry Street]], the guild's presence begins to win the favor of [[Shera]]. Looking toward the future, [[Lucan]] expresses a desire to steer the direction of the group.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[The Consultant]]’s [[Guild]] can be hired by clients.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c1">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[The Consultant]]’s [[Guild]] maintains archives.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c2">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Members of the [[Consultant]]’s [[Guild]] arrived at [[75 Hanberry Street]] to investigate suspicions for their clients.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c3">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]] is starting to like the [[Consultant's Guild]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The crest of the [[Consultant]]’s [[Guild]] is a simple pair of gardening shears.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c4">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Consultant's Guild]] receives information relayed by [[Masons]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c6">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[The Consultant]]’s [[Guild]] is a group that [[Lucan]] hopes to steer.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c14">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[The Consultant]]'s [[Guild]] is an organization recognized as one of the groups capable of swaying public opinion. Described as the most loyal guild within the [[Empire]], the group manages client issues with efficiency and works to remove threats to those under their protection. During a period of rising tension, [[Calder]] contemplates launching an attack against the guild and eventually addresses them directly. Amidst these developments, [[Kelarac]] urges [[Calder]] and his allies to cut through the organization.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[The Consultant]]’s [[Guild]] is one of the groups that may sway public opinion.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c8">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Consultant's Guild]] is described as the most loyal [[Guild]] in the [[Empire]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c10">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[The Consultant]]’s [[Guild]] manages each client's issues with efficiency and removes threats to clients under their protection.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c12">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] is considering whether or not to attack the [[Consultant]]’s [[Guild]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c18">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] addresses the [[Consultant]]’s [[Guild]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c20">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Kelarac]] wants [[Calder]] and his allies to cut through the [[Consultant's Guild]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c22">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[The Consultant]]’s [[Guild]] is an organization.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c24">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 24</ref>}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[The Consultant]]'s [[Guild]] maintains a chapter house located on the western side of [[Gray Island]] and is led by three individuals, one of whom is [[Kerian]]. While [[Lucan]] holds an attachment to the organization, the [[Guild]] primarily utilizes [[Soulbound]] members to conduct various investigations. The group is currently embroiled in a looming conflict with other [[Guilds]], a struggle that [[Shera]] has actively plunged the organization into.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Kerian]] serves as one of the three leaders of the [[Consultant's Guild]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c2">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Consultant's Guild]] has a chapter house on the western side of [[Gray Island]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Lucan]] has an attachment to the [[Consultant's Guild]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c4">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[The Consultant]]’s [[Guild]] sends [[Soulbound]] on investigations.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c6">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[The Consultant]]’s [[Guild]] is involved in a looming conflict with other [[Guilds]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Consultant's Guild]] is the organization [[Shera]] has plunged into conflict.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c17">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[The Consultant]]’s [[Guild]] is a group that [[Calder]] hopes will join them rather than remain in open rebellion.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c15">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Bliss]] mentions the [[Consultant]]’s [[Guild]] in relation to her revenge.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c23">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 23</ref>}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Headquartered on [[Gray Island]], the [[Consultant]]’s [[Guild]] employs workers within fish warehouses and the [[Rainworth docks]]. Led by [[Shera]] along with three [[High Councilors]], the organization provides security redesign experts and produces reports used to identify [[Champions]]. Although members were among those left standing during certain events, the group's influence declined during the years of the [[Regents]] and they have not appointed a new [[Guild Head]] for some time. Operating under unspoken rules and specific laws regarding secrets, trespassing, assault, property destruction, and defiance of orders, the guild observes conversations between clients and even attempted to bribe the [[Champion]]. Despite their role in allowing the [[Empire]] to rot for three years, there is a growing concern that the guild might eventually be shut down.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[The Consultant]]’s [[Guild]] employs workers in the [[Rainworth docks]] and fish warehouses.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c2">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] is the [[Head of the Consultant’s Guild]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c4">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[The Consultant]]’s [[Guild]] provides experts to redesign and rebuild security.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c5">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Members of the [[Consultant]]’s [[Guild]] were among those left standing.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[The Consultant]]’s [[Guild]] is represented by [[Shera]] and three [[High Councilors]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c6">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[The Consultant]]’s [[Guild]] tried to bribe the [[Champion]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[The Consultant]]’s [[Guild]] has headquarters on [[Gray Island]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Consultant's Guild]] has not appointed a new [[Guild Head]] for some time.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c7">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Zhen]] is a member of the [[Consultant]]’s [[Guild]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c9">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The power and influence of the [[Consultant]]’s [[Guild]] dipped during years when [[Regents]] were active.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c11">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|There is a concern that the [[Consultant]]’s [[Guild]] might be shut down.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c13">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[The Consultant]]’s [[Guild]] is a group that observes conversations between clients.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c14">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[The Consultant]]’s [[Guild]] has unspoken rules.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c15">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[The Consultant]]’s [[Guild]] produces reports that identify [[Champions]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c16">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[The Consultant]]’s [[Guild]] is a group that [[Shera]] and [[Lucan]] were not firmly bound to.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c17">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Consultant's Guild]] allowed the [[Empire]] to rot for three years.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c19">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[The Consultant]]’s [[Guild]] has three leaders.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c21">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[The Consultant]]’s [[Guild]] has laws regarding assault, destruction of property, divulgence of secrets, trespassing, and defiance of orders.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c21" />}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|“Do not underestimate the Consultant’s Guild,” Naberius said quietly.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c3" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|“Friends of the Consultant’s Guild, this is the Imperial Steward, speaking with the authority of the Emperor himself.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c20" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|“Ladies and gentlemen of the Consultant’s Guild, you may notice that we have you surrounded.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c24" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|“We also need the Gray Island back. There’s more to it than just the Consultant’s Guild headquarters.”<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c6" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|“Assault of fellow Guild members, destruction of Guild property, divulgence of Council secrets, trespassing, and defiance of Council orders.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c21" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire groups]]
